rows.label: tev020402_MSG0001
rows.name:
I heard gunshots and some
sort of dying wail from the
other side of the west gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020402_MSG0002
rows.name:
I guess one of the teams must have
been fighting with an indigen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020402_MSG0003
rows.name:
I really hope they finally took out the
aggressive indigens that have been causing
problems just outside the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020402_MSG0004
rows.name:
Because in that case, we should be
able to reopen the west gate soon![ST:wait ]
